title: Non-record submission: Activation-Space CSA on SP1024 (8xH100)
author: lucribas

data.description: Activation-Space Compressed-Sensing Adapters (ACSA) that adapt hidden activations with a sparse code instead of LoRA weight deltas.

novel_contributions: Activation-Space Compressed-Sensing Adapters (ACSA) as an alternative to LoRA-based evaluation-time adaptation
Sparse activation-space adaptation using a structured sensing map with sign flips, permutation, and FWHT
Preservation of score-before-update evaluation protocol with adapter state reset between documents
Non-record SP1024 submission demonstrating improvement over the quantized no-ACSA roundtrip while staying under the 16 MB artifact cap
